commands.title: Tailwind CSS: Sort Classes
commands.description: Sorts Tailwind utility classes in the selected class attribute following the recommended Headwind/Prettier-plugin-tailwindcss order.

commands.title: Tailwind CSS: Show Generated CSS
commands.description: Displays the compiled CSS output for the Tailwind utility classes under the cursor or in the selection.

commands.title: Tailwind CSS: Open Configuration
commands.description: Opens the tailwind.config.js configuration file for the current workspace.

commands.title: Tailwind CSS: Extract to @apply Component
commands.description: Extracts selected utility classes into a new CSS component using @apply directive.

commands.title: Tailwind CSS: Show Color Palette
commands.description: Displays the full Tailwind color palette with hex values from the theme configuration.

commands.title: Tailwind CSS: Convert to Arbitrary Value
commands.description: Converts a standard utility value to arbitrary bracket notation, e.g. p-4 to p-[1rem].

commands.title: Tailwind CSS: Remove Duplicate Classes
commands.description: Removes duplicate utility classes from the selected class attribute.

commands.title: Tailwind CSS: Wrap with Responsive Prefix
commands.description: Wraps selected utility classes with a chosen responsive breakpoint prefix (sm:, md:, lg:, xl:, 2xl:).
